zh-CN.short: AI stylist + virtual try-on, never worry about what to wear
zh-CN.full:
XunShang is your AI-powered personal style consultant.

[Core Features]
- AI Stylist: Get personalized outfit recommendations based on your body type, skin tone, and style preferences
- Virtual Try-On: See yourself wearing recommended outfits before you buy
- Smart Recommendations: Discover new styles daily with personalized feed
- Personal Style Profile: Visual quiz to establish your style DNA
- Weather-Aware: Outfit suggestions factor in local weather conditions
- Smart Shopping: Size recommendations based on your body measurements

[Why XunShang?]
- AI-powered personalization that improves over time
- Virtual try-on saves time and reduces returns
- Style education through color theory and body type analysis
- Curated fashion from trusted brands

Download XunShang and never wonder what to wear again.
